.metadata-properties.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: color(srgb 1 1 1 / 0.35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 4.8px / 10px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 4.8px / 10px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.07) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(195, 216, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(195, 216, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(195, 225, 211) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: color(srgb 0.988235 0.988235 0.988235 / 0.95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(249, 249, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(249, 249, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(249, 249, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
